title: Insurance Underwriter
description: McKinsey & Company is expanding our insurance practice and seeking an Insurance Underwriter to support our management consulting engagements. This fully remote position will provide analytical and operational support to our consulting teams working with leading insurance carriers. You'll gain exposure to strategic consulting while leveraging underwriting expertise to drive client value.
responsibilities: Analyze insurance underwriting processes and risk assessment methodologies for client organizations
Review underwriting guidelines, rating models, and policy requirements to identify optimization opportunities
Prepare detailed underwriting case studies and process maps for client presentations
Support due diligence activities for insurance company acquisitions and strategic partnerships
Collaborate with senior consultants to develop client recommendations based on underwriting insights
Maintain knowledge of insurance industry trends, regulatory changes, and competitive landscape

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Finance, Insurance, Risk Management, or related discipline
skills: Ability to work with cross-functional teams
certifications: ARM (Associate in Risk Management) or CLU (Chartered Life Underwriter) preferred

benefits: Professional development through McKinsey's learning platform
Flexible work arrangements with fully remote option
